_protocol: Retrieval protocol: load index.json always; fetch catalog/components/<x>.json (x = component id without the namespace prefix, e.g. ds.button → button.json) for each component you intend to use; fetch tokens.json when styling. catalog/catalog.json is the equivalent monolithic form — do not load it when the sharded form is available.

system.name: DS Contracts POC
system.source: Compiled from contracts/*.contract.json + tokens/ + context/rules.json — do not edit.

package.name: ds-contracts-poc
package.usage: import { Button, Card, Table } from 'ds-contracts-poc'; import 'ds-contracts-poc/styles.css';

rules.statement: Every UI element comes from the catalog. Unknown components are gaps to report, never to invent.
No literal colors or pixel values anywhere. All styling flows through design tokens (var(--…)) — and in screens, styling flows only through components.
Never use raw HTML elements the system provides a component for.
No className or style props on system components. If a component can't express it, that's a gap in the contract — report it.
At most one primary Button per screen.
Compose layout with Stack and Inline, not hand-styled wrappers.
Avatars represent people or entities, never decoration.

components.name: AccordionItem
components.summary: A collapsible content row: trigger with a state chevron, content revealed when open.

components.name: Avatar
components.summary: Represents a person or entity with initials.

components.name: AvatarGroup
components.summary: Stacked avatars with an overflow count.

components.name: Badge
components.summary: Communicates status or categorization at a glance.

components.name: Button
components.summary: Triggers an action or event.

components.name: Banner
components.summary: Persistent inline notification for page- or section-level feedback.

components.name: Blockquote
components.summary: Styled quotation block with an accent left border for quotes, testimonials, and excerpts.

components.name: BreadcrumbItem
components.summary: One link in a breadcrumb trail with its leading separator.

components.name: Breadcrumbs
components.summary: Navigation trail from root to the current page.

components.name: Card
components.summary: Groups related content behind one subject.

components.name: ChatMessageMetadata
components.summary: Metadata row for a chat message: delivery status, timestamp, and footer content.

components.name: ChatMessage
components.summary: Sender-context wrapper for a chat message: avatar, name, bubble content, and metadata.

components.name: ChatSystemMessage
components.summary: Centered system message for non-sender chat content — date separators, membership changes, status notices.

components.name: Checkbox
components.summary: Toggles a single on/off value — settings, terms acceptance, opt-ins.

components.name: Citation
components.summary: Inline reference to an external source — attribution in AI-generated responses, articles, anywhere provenance matters.

components.name: Code
components.summary: Inline code element with monospace font and muted background.

components.name: Divider
components.summary: Visual separator dividing content into distinct sections.

components.name: EmptyState
components.summary: Placeholder for a content area with no data — empty lists, zero results, first-time setup.

components.name: Field
components.summary: Form field wrapper providing a label, description, and required indicator around any control.

components.name: IconButton
components.summary: A button showing only an icon, for toolbars, table rows, and compact UI.

components.name: Inline
components.summary: Horizontal layout primitive — lays children out in a row with a token-governed gap, vertically centered.

components.name: Kbd
components.summary: Renders a keyboard shortcut as a styled key badge for tooltips, menus, and help text.

components.name: ListItem
components.summary: A single row in a List: label with optional description, leading and trailing content.

components.name: List
components.summary: Vertical collection of items with consistent density.

components.name: MetadataListItem
components.summary: One key–value pair in a MetadataList: a label and a value area.

components.name: MetadataList
components.summary: Key–value pairs for object attributes — detail panels, settings summaries, record information.

components.name: Pagination
components.summary: Steps through pages of content, below a table or list.

components.name: ProgressBar
components.summary: Horizontal bar showing completion progress.

components.name: Section
components.summary: The standard way to create page regions and group related content — settings groups, form sections, sidebar areas.

components.name: SideNavItem
components.summary: A sidebar navigation row: icon, label, and trailing content, with a selected state.

components.name: Skeleton
components.summary: Pulsing placeholder previewing the shape of loading content.

components.name: Slider
components.summary: Numeric selection within bounds — the static surface of a slider: label, filled track to the current value, and thumb.

components.name: Spinner
components.summary: Animated loading indicator for processes of unknown duration.

components.name: Stack
components.summary: Vertical layout primitive — stacks children with a token-governed gap.

components.name: StatusDot
components.summary: Small colored dot communicating status — presence, severity, activity.

components.name: Switch
components.summary: Toggle for on/off settings that take effect immediately.

components.name: Tab
components.summary: A single tab in a TabList.

components.name: TabList
components.summary: Tab-style navigation container holding Tab items.

components.name: TableCell
components.summary: A single data cell in a table row.

components.name: TableHeaderCell
components.summary: A column header cell.

components.name: TableRow
components.summary: A selectable row of table cells.

components.name: Table
components.summary: Structured data in rows and columns.

components.name: TextArea
components.summary: Multi-line text input for longer-form content — comments, descriptions, messages.

components.name: TextField
components.summary: Single-line text input for short-form values — names, emails, search queries.

components.name: Toast
components.summary: Brief non-blocking notification confirming an action.

components.name: Token
components.summary: Small inline element for discrete associated data — tags, categories, active filters.

components.name: Toolbar
components.summary: General-purpose toolbar container with start, center, and end content areas for contextual actions.

components.name: TopNavItem
components.summary: A navigation item in a TopNav or SideNav context.

components.name: TopNav
components.summary: Horizontal main navigation bar with heading, start, center, and end areas.

components.name: TypeaheadItem
components.summary: Default dropdown item for search results: label with optional icon and description.
